rationale: The main alert (A0) shows a suspicious executable name using a right-to-left override (RTLO) character, masquerading as a screensaver. This process then initiates a network connection to an internal IP on a non-standard port (EV-001). Subsequently, it spawns cmd.exe (EV-002), which then spawns powershell.exe (EV-003), indicating a potential command-and-control or further execution attempt.
